rows.strict_supervisor_conclusion: Window 008 now has one December leader, three December followers, and a February failure map; this is enough to study diffusion-versus-failed-followthrough, but still not enough for a full-window final-training pass.

interpretation: Window 008 is now split into a December selective-diffusion map and a February failed-followthrough map.
The most important negative evidence is that the best December leader also broke in February.
This artifact clarifies why the meeting chain is useful for subwindow learning but still not fit for a full-window final-training pass.
